ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "name" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "name_year" TEXT /* Concatenated title and release year */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the movie */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Short tagline or catchphrase for the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Brief overview or synopsis of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie poster image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie trailer video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tmdb" (
  "tmdbid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie in TMDB */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie in the movies table */,
  "tmdb_data" TEXT /* JSON object containing TMDB-specific movie data */,
  "popularity" REAL /* A measure of the movie's popularity on TMDB */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* The number of votes the movie has received on TMDB */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* The average rating of the movie on TMDB */,
  "backdrop_url" TEXT /* URL to the backdrop image of the movie on TMDB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tmdbid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tmdb_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imdb" (
  "imdbid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie in IMDb */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie in the movies table */,
  "imdb_data" TEXT /* JSON object containing IMDb-specific movie data */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes (if different from the main movies table) */,
  "certificate" TEXT /* Certification or rating of the movie */,
  "metascore" INTEGER /* The Metascore of the movie from critics */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* The number of votes the movie has received on IMDb */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imdbid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imdb_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user's account */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the database */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "about_me" TEXT /* A brief description about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who favorited the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the favorited movie */,
  "favorite_date" TEXT /* Date when the user favorited the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rated movie */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating value submitted by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was submitted */,
  "rating_comment" TEXT /* A comment or note from the user about their rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewed movie */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" REAL /* A rating (1-5 stars) associated with the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* A title for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is receiving the recommendation */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended movie */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was generated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* A brief reason for the recommendation */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the recommendation (e.g., algorithm, user, editor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent genre (for hierarchical genre organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "actor_biography" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the actor's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors" (
  "movie_actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-actor relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role or character played by the actor in the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_actor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_actors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_actors_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "director_biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the director's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "movie_director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-director relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the director (e.g., director, co-director) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_directors_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_directors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("id")
)
